title: Successful Reddit video extraction shows preview and download link
description: Verifies that a valid Reddit post URL with video results in a visible video preview and a downloadable link.

steps.description: Fill "a valid Reddit post URL that contains a video" into the reddit video URL input field

title: Invalid URL is rejected with a clear validation error
description: Verifies that a non-Reddit or malformed URL triggers a visible invalid URL error message.

steps.description: Fill "https://example.com/not-reddit" into the reddit video URL input field
Verify element "video preview" is not visible

title: Empty submission prompts user to enter a URL
description: Verifies that submitting with an empty input shows a visible error or prompt to paste a Reddit post link.

steps.description: Verify element "download link" is not visible

title: Valid Reddit URL with no video shows 'no downloadable video' error
description: Verifies that a valid Reddit post URL that has no video results in an appropriate visible no-video error message.

steps.description: Fill "a valid Reddit post URL that contains no video" into the reddit video URL input field
Verify element "video preview" is not visible

title: Replacing the URL and resubmitting updates the result state
description: Verifies that running a second submission after changing the URL updates the UI from success to error (or vice versa) without requiring a page reload.

steps.description: Fill "a valid Reddit post URL that contains a video" into the reddit video URL input field
Fill "https://example.com/not-reddit" into the reddit video URL input field

title: Terms and Privacy pages are reachable from the app
description: Verifies that legal pages are accessible and render expected headings/content.

title: Unknown route shows Not Found page
description: Verifies the app displays a 404/Not Found view for an invalid path.

title: Open Terms page and verify core Terms content is displayed
description: Verifies that navigating to the Terms route shows the Terms and Conditions page content to the user.

steps.description: Verify text "Terms and Conditions" is visible
Verify element "Terms and Conditions content" is visible

title: Terms page footer links allow navigation to Privacy Policy
description: Verifies that a user can navigate from the Terms page to the Privacy page using visible links (without direct URL entry).

title: Terms page provides a way to return to Home
description: Verifies that the Terms page includes a visible navigation option back to the Home page.

steps.description: Verify element "Reddit post URL input" is visible

title: Terms page can be reached from Home page link
description: Verifies that the user can reach the Terms and Conditions page from the Home page via an on-page Terms link.

steps.description: Verify text "Terms and Conditions" is visible

title: Terms route does not land on 404 page
description: Verifies that the static /terms route resolves correctly and does not show the Not Found page content.

steps.description: Verify text "Not Found" is not visible
Verify text "Terms and Conditions" is visible

title: Open Privacy Policy page and see policy content
description: Verifies that navigating to the Privacy Policy page shows visible privacy policy content.

steps.description: Verify element "Privacy Policy content" is visible

title: Privacy Policy page shows clear content structure (headings/sections)
description: Verifies the Privacy Policy page renders readable, sectioned content rather than a blank or broken page.

steps.description: Verify element "A section heading within the privacy policy" is visible
Verify element "A paragraph of privacy policy text" is visible
Verify element "A link or reference within the privacy policy" is visible

title: Privacy Policy page has no obvious rendering failure state on load
description: Verifies the Privacy Policy page does not show a not-found or generic error state during a normal load.

steps.description: Verify text "Not Found" is not visible
Verify element "Privacy Policy content" is visible

title: Privacy Policy page contains a visible last-updated/effective-date indicator (if provided)
description: Verifies that an effective date or last updated indicator is visible to users if the page includes it.

title: Navigate from Home to Privacy Policy via footer/header link (if present)
description: Verifies users can reach the Privacy Policy page through an in-app navigation link.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify element "Privacy Policy content" is visible

title: Direct navigation to an unknown route shows the 404 page
description: Verifies that navigating to an invalid URL displays a clear Not Found page.

title: Use the 404 page link to return to Home
description: Verifies that the 404 page provides a working path back to the home downloader page.

title: 404 page displays a clear message and guidance to go back
description: Verifies the 404 page includes user-friendly guidance to recover (e.g., go back home).

steps.description: Verify element "link to return to home" is visible

title: 404 page remains visible after refresh on an unknown route
description: Verifies that the Not Found page is stable when reloading an invalid route.

title: Wildcard route (*) maps to the Not Found page for random unknown paths
description: Verifies that arbitrary unknown paths consistently show the Not Found page.

title: From 404 page, returning home shows downloader UI is usable
description: Verifies that returning from 404 to Home shows the expected primary UI entry point (URL input).
